dict.string: Used to open Terminal so you can run `claude /login` when adding an account.
Copyright © 2026 Thanh Ngô. Licensed under MIT.
Claude Bar 10.48 — menu-bar manager for multiple Claude Code accounts

Adding a GitLab self-host instance now gives proper feedback. The form shows "Adding…" with a spinner during the round-trip, then either an inline green "Successfully added 'Name'" confirmation that auto-closes after 1.2 seconds, or an inline red error so you can fix the field and retry without closing the window. Settings → MCP connectors list now reflects GitLab as connected once an instance is added. Previously the row stayed stuck at "not connected" forever because GitLab instance secrets live in a separate per-instance Keychain slot the row didn't read; the backend now mirrors the connection state into the shared connector flag the row does read. Removing the last GitLab instance flips the connector back to "not connected" automatically.
Fixed GitLab add-instance form closing silently with no success or error feedback. Fixed Settings → MCP connector row showing GitLab as "not connected" after a successful instance add.
